title: Village Farms International Reports First Quarter 2021 Financial Results
text: Village Farms International reported Q1 2021 financial results with Pure Sunfarms achieving third consecutive quarter of sequential growth in Retail Branded Sales of 20% or greater. This demonstrated strong market momentum and consumer preference for the company's cannabis brands. The quarter showed continued strength in Canadian cannabis operations with retail branded sales growth driving profitability. Pure Sunfarms maintained leading market position in dried flower across key Canadian provinces including Ontario, Alberta, and British Columbia. Sequential growth of 20% or greater across three consecutive quarters represented sustained momentum in the competitive Canadian cannabis market.
